summary: Deployment-config smoke test for Render Python pin. runtime.txt verified (exact content 'python-3.11.9\n', 14 bytes via od -c). requirements.txt: pip install --dry-run on Python 3.11.15 resolved all 28 pins with no conflicts (numpy>=1.26.0 and pandas>=2.2.0 install fine on 3.11). Backend supervisor running Py 3.11.15, GET /api/buildings and GET /api/dashboard/summary return 200 via public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Regression pytest suite (backend/tests/backend_test.py) 7/7 passed in 2.65s covering buildings/tenants/payments CRUD, rent_history, dues_notes, payment_type/sent_to.
critical_code_review_comments: runtime.txt uses the exact Render-required format 'python-3.11.9' with trailing LF - correct.
No Python 3.13-incompatible syntax detected; backend already runs on 3.11.15 locally without warnings.
Consider also pinning setuptools/pip in a Render build hook if numpy wheels are missing for 3.11 on ARM, but not needed for standard Render linux/amd64.
seed_data_creation: None new; existing fixtures create ephemeral TEST_ building/tenant and clean up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: runtime.txt at /app/backend/runtime.txt pins python-3.11.9 for Render. requirements.txt pip dry-run resolves on 3.11. Regression suite lives at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest.ini in /app/backend). Public URL via frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
